name: Translator
description: 一个支持系统翻译、Apple Intelligence、Google 网页翻译和可配置 AI 接口的翻译脚本。

localizedDescriptions.en: A translation script with system translation, Apple Intelligence, Google web translation, and configurable AI APIs.
